query:
-- 1. Billing items summary by platform: total, matched, assigned
SELECT 
  billingPlatform,
  COUNT(*) as totalItems,
  SUM(CASE WHEN matchStatus = 'matched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as matched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN matchStatus = 'review' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as review,
  SUM(CASE WHEN matchStatus = 'unmatched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unmatched,
  COUNT(DISTINCT serviceExternalId) as distinctServicesLinked
FROM billing_items
GROUP BY billingPlatform
ORDER BY billingPlatform;

-- 2. Services with assignments: how many have at least one billing item assignment
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.externalId) as servicesWithAssignments,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.externalId) FILTER (WHERE s.monthlyRevenue > 0) as servicesWithRevenue,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.externalId) FILTER (WHERE s.monthlyRevenue = 0) as servicesZeroRevenue,
  COUNT(*) as totalServices
FROM services s
WHERE s.isActive = 1;

-- 3. Billing items that are matched but have NO service_billing_assignment record
SELECT COUNT(*) as matchedWithNoAssignment
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.matchStatus = 'matched'
  AND bi.serviceExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM service_billing_assignments sba 
    WHERE sba.billingItemId = bi.id
  );
